## Summary

One-line summary of the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore / Build

## Related issues
- Fixes #<issue-number> (if applicable)
- Related to #<issue-number>

## Description

Describe what you changed and why. Keep it concise but include enough context for reviewers.

## How to test
Steps to reproduce or verify the changes locally:
1. ...
2. ...

## Screenshots (optional)
If this PR changes UI, add before/after screenshots or a short GIF.

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran the project locally and verified the change
- [ ] I added/updated unit tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated documentation if necessary
- [ ] I followed the project's coding conventions

## Reviewer notes
Any additional notes for reviewers, background context, or trade-offs.

---

Thank you for your contribution! Please add a clear description and link any related issues.
